name: ecommerce-microservices
description: Minimalist clothing ecommerce built with microservices

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --workspace=services/gateway" "npm run start --workspace=services/user_service" "npm run start --workspace=services/product_service" "npm run start --workspace=services/cart_service" "npm run start --workspace=services/order_service" "npm run start --workspace=services/payment_service"
scripts.build:backend: npx prisma generate --schema=services/user_service/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=services/product_service/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=services/order_service/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:product" "npm run dev:cart" "npm run dev:order" "npm run dev:payment"
